title: Porting the Moebius 0.2B image inpainting model to run in the browser with Claude Code
abstract: This morning on Hacker News I saw Moebius: 0.2B Lightweight Image Inpainting Framework w
abstract_zh: 伙计们！咱今天给大伙儿安利个神器——**Porting the Moebius 0.2B image inpainting model to run in the browser with Claude Code**。这货简直是个效率杀手啊！比如你写周报时发现图片有缺口，直接用它补上，那叫一个丝滑流畅，比你用PS修图快多了！而且运行在浏览器里，啥也不怕泄露啦，省心又方便！
